# @emisso/self-healing

> Self-healing SDK for Next.js + Supabase + Vercel — monitors, diagnoses, fixes, and notifies.

- Repo: https://github.com/emisso-ai/emisso-self-healing
- License: MIT

## Install

npm install @emisso/self-healing

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/emisso-ai/emisso-self-healing/blob/main/README.md)
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/emisso-ai/emisso-self-healing/blob/main/AGENTS.md)

## How it works

Production Error → Vercel/Supabase log ingestion → Claude Agent SDK analysis → Vercel Sandbox testing → GitHub PR → Slack/Discord notification. Never auto-merges. Human approval required.

## API

- `HealingPipeline(config)` — Main orchestrator class
- `parseVercelLogs(entries)` — Parse Vercel log drain webhook
- `detectSlowQueries(config)` — Detect slow Supabase queries
- `parseSupabaseWebhook(payload)` — Parse Supabase database webhook
- `analyzeIssue(issue, config)` — AI-powered codebase analysis
- `triageIssue(issue, config)` — Classify severity and decide action
- `testFixInSandbox(analysis, config)` — Run fix in Vercel Sandbox
- `createFixPR(analysis, testResult, config)` — Create GitHub PR
- `notifyAll(notification, config)` — Send to all configured channels
- `SelfHealingConfigSchema` — Zod schema for full configuration
